code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(xs)
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(y)
      if not inserted and x < y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, y)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(a)
  match list.get(a, i)
  when Some(x)
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if list.len(result) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < list.len(result)
    match list.get(result, j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
